text:
Fickle Genie (, Kimagure Majin) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. This genie will grant you 3 wishes... with a catch of course!
__NOTOC__

Summary

When 'gained', this card summons forth a fickle genie. He will grant you three wishes, but you first need to suggest 1,000 different ones, and he will pick which three to make come true. In other words, you first need to come up with 1,000 different wishes, each one different from the rest. The genie will then pick three of these to grant. The genie does not allow similar wishes like values of money.

When this card is combined with the effects of the Risky Dice, the chances of getting the actual wishes you want is increased dramatically. Should you roll bad luck however, you will not only get granted the worst wish you have written, but you will also suffer the usual effects of rolling the dice, which is usually death.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.015 - きまぐれ魔人 
３つの望みを叶えてくれる魔人。ただし、違う望みを1000コ挙げて、その中から魔人が勝手に選ぶ。（「100億くれ」、「101億くれ」など、金額を変えて望みを水増しするのは不可。）
|-
![Eng]
|No.015 - Fickle Genie 
This majin will grant 3 wishes. However, citing 1000 different wishes you hope for, the genie will choose freely from them. ("Give me 10 billion" and changing its value, e.g. 10.1 bllion, is not possible.)
|}

Trivia

In the manga, when deciding what 3 cards they should take out the game, Killua voices his opinion in how useful the "Fickle Genie" and "Risky Dice" combination would be in the real world.
